sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the unit-03 template (objectif fonctionnel + Point Langue grammar + thematic lexicon + DELF-format comprehension), then self-audited before commit. Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego+ A1 (Hachette), Dossier 8 'Vivre en ville ?' (au restaurant, les adjectifs qualificatifs, place de l'adjectif). Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
